site.title: #1 TikTok Shop Health & Wellness Affiliate 2025 — $8M+ GMV | Hammad Media
site.description: TikTok Shop's #1 Health & Wellness affiliate for 2025. One creator, two accounts, $8M+ GMV. Send your supplement and I turn it into a bestseller.
site.statsUpdated: June 8, 2026 (YTD: Jan 1 – Jun 8, 2026, both accounts combined)

hero.headline: I turn supplements into bestsellers.
hero.subheadline: TikTok Shop's #1 Health & Wellness affiliate for 2025. Two accounts, $2.79M+ GMV this year — every video scripted, filmed, and posted by me. 105M+ product views and 113K+ units sold.

steps.title: Send me your product
steps.text: Ship a sample and set an affiliate commission on TikTok Shop. Supplements and wellness products are my specialty — it's where my audience already buys.

steps.title: I create the content
steps.text: I make every review video myself — strong openings, real demonstrations, honest opinions. The first video is typically live within 48 hours of your sample arriving. No editors, no agencies, no approval rounds.

steps.title: You verify every sale
steps.text: Content goes live across my accounts, and every attributed sale is verified in your own TikTok Shop Seller Center — not my slides. Full transparency.

partnership.heading: Ways to partner
partnership.sub: Three ways to work together. Every one keeps me invested in your sales — pick the level of priority your product deserves.

tiers.name: Boosted Commission
tiers.text: Raise my commission rate on TikTok Shop and your product joins the testing lineup. You pay only when products sell. No fixed number of videos: I post what performs, and higher rates get priority.

tiers.name: Retainer + Commission
tiers.text: A guaranteed number of review videos every month, posted across both accounts — plus commission on every sale. Paid upfront, month to month, no long-term contract.

tiers.name: Exclusive
tiers.text: One brand per product category. I never promote your competitors — your products get the entire category across both accounts. Retainer + commission + performance bonuses. Once your category is taken, it is closed.
tiers.price: From $50,000 per month — complete niche exclusivity

partnership.note: Every deal pays me the most when your product sells — I only win when you win. And because I am one person, not an agency, I keep a hard limit: four new products each month, no more. Mailing samples to one hundred small creators gets you one hundred experiments. Working with the #1 affiliate in your category gets you a measured result in the first week. When the month is full, the next spot goes to the product that fits best. Supplement and wellness brands always come first.

contact.heading: Work with me
contact.subheading: Tell me about your product — your TikTok Shop link, category, and the commission you have in mind. I take on a maximum of four new products each month, and slots go to the products that fit best. I reply to every brand inquiry within 24 hours, and the person who replies is the person who makes your videos. If it is a fit, the next step is a short call where I show you the live sales dashboards.

faq.heading: Questions brands ask

items.q: How fast is the first video?
items.a: Fast. Once your sample arrives and the commission is set, the first video is typically live within **48 hours**. Retainer partners get a guaranteed number of videos every month.
It depends on price point and margin.
bullets: Most products I take on run **20–35%** on TikTok Shop
Higher rates get priority in my content rotation
Performance bonuses move you to the top of the list for your category

items.a: **Yes to talking points, no to approval rounds.** Send me your key points and I will read every word. But I do not send drafts, and I do not reshoot based on notes — the video goes straight from my camera to my audience. This is not ego; it is the system. When brands edit videos, the videos start to feel like ads, and ads do not sell on TikTok Shop. Every number on this page came from working exactly this way.

On commission deals, your only risk is **one product sample** — I take the rest. And I do not give up after one video: I test different openings and styles, and some products need three videos before one becomes a hit. My biggest winner took more than 200 videos across two years. If a product truly does not fit my audience, I will tell you directly and save us both time.
Priced per video and **paid upfront** — the video count is agreed before we start:
bullets: Month to month — no long-term contract.
items.tail: Smaller budget? Start with Boosted Commission — you pay only when you get sales.

items.q: How does the Exclusive tier work?
items.a: Exclusivity means I never promote your competitors. Complete health & wellness exclusivity starts at **$50,000 per month**, **paid upfront**:
bullets: **Category exclusivity** — retainer + commission + performance bonuses, priced case by case
Example: lock collagen, and only your collagen ever appears on my accounts
Month to month. One brand per category — once a category is taken, it is closed.

items.q: Can we run your videos as ads?
items.a: Yes — through TikTok Spark Ads. I provide an authorization code so you can boost any of my videos as an ad from my own handle, which performs better than reposting the file on your brand account. My videos can also power your GMV Max campaigns. Ad usage rights are agreed per deal — tell me in your inquiry if ad usage matters to you, and I will include it in the offer.

items.q: Our team is not based in the US — can we still work together?
items.a: Yes. Many of my partners run TikTok Shop US from teams outside the US. You ship the sample from your US warehouse, we agree terms over email, and retainers are invoiced through Hammad Media LLC, a registered US company, paid upfront by bank transfer. Commission-only deals need no payment setup at all — TikTok Shop pays the commission automatically.

faq.sub: Straight answers — the same ones I give on calls.

legal.disclaimer: Brand names and product images appear solely to document affiliate sales history and do not imply sponsorship or endorsement. All trademarks are the property of their respective owners.
legal.privacy: Privacy: inquiries submitted through this form are delivered to my inbox and used only to respond to you. This site sets no cookies and runs no trackers. Your information is never sold or added to a marketing list.

receipts.sub: Six products. $1.1M in sales since January 1. Every top video is linked — check the views yourself.
